- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (User specified Next.js 15, TS, Tailwind, Framer Motion, theme, and structure.)

- [x] Scaffold the Project (Next.js app created in the workspace root.)

- [x] Customize the Project (Theme, data, sections, and layout updated.)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (No extensions required.)

- [x] Compile the Project (Ran `npm run lint`.)

- [x] Create and Run Task (Not needed for this project.)

- [ ] Launch the Project

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README updated and comments removed.)
- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
